messages.content: You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What is a Precious Metals Account?

{"response":"A Precious Metals Account lets you invest in gold and silver through the OCBC app without holding them physically, with no sales charge or custody fees.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I sell my gold anytime?
{"response":"Yes, you can buy and sell gold and silver 24/7 using the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Is there a minimum age requirement?
{"response":"You must be at least 18 years old and have an OCBC deposit account with access to the OCBC app to invest in precious metals.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do I need to buy a full bar of gold?
{"response":"No, you can start from as little as 0.01 ounces of gold or silver, making it accessible even with smaller amounts.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I begin investing in precious metals?

{"response":"Log in to the OCBC app, go to More > Investments > Precious Metals, open an account instantly, and enter your purchase details to start investing.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Are precious metals considered a hedge against inflation?
{"response":"Gold and silver are commonly used to hedge against inflation and are considered safe haven investments during periods of market uncertainty.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I check my holdings in the app?
{"response":"Yes, after completing your transactions, you can track your precious metals investments directly within the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Why do people invest in silver?

{"response":"Silver is a more affordable alternative to gold and has capital appreciation potential due to its industrial uses, including demand from solar energy and electric vehicles.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I track the status of my overseas funds transfer?

{"response":"Yes. Go to OCBC Internet Banking > Customer service > Check internet transaction status, then set Transaction type to Fund Transfer to view the status.","in_app":true,"product":"overseas transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I send money to overseas wallets across Asia using OCBC?

{"response":"Yes. You can send money across Asia to 10 overseas wallets. Transfers are fast, secure and direct, and you can send at zero fees to popular wallets such as Alipay, Weixin Pay, Touch ‘n Go, OVO and GCash.","in_app":true,"product":"overseas transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Are there any extra fees when sending to overseas wallets?
{"response":"The transfers are offered at zero fees, but admin or transaction fees may also apply depending on the respective wallets.","in_app":true,"product":"overseas transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do the requirements differ for each overseas wallet beneficiary?

{"response":"Yes. Beneficiary requirements may vary by digital wallet and can include identification, contact information, residency status, or other criteria. Please check with the respective wallet operator for details.","in_app":true,"product":"overseas transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do you support same-day transfer for CAD?
{"response":"Same-day is available if you submit before the cut-off time on a business day. For CAD overseas funds transfers, the cut-off time is 5:00PM.","in_app":true,"product":"overseas transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Are the cable and commission fee waivers only for online transfers?

{"response":"The page states cable and commission fees are waived for overseas funds transfers via OCBC Online Banking, and the S$0 cable and commission fee promotion is valid till 31 December 2025 for online overseas funds transfer.","in_app":true,"product":"overseas transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Does PayNow help me qualify for the Disney+ subscription reward?
{"response":"Yes. To qualify, you must credit a salary of at least S$1,800 via GIRO, FAST, PayNow via GIRO or PayNow via FAST within the promotion period.","in_app":true,"product":"paynow"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
If my PayNow salary credit does not show SAL or GIRO-SALARY, will it qualify?
{"response":"No. Only salary credits with GIRO-SALARY description or SAL-related FAST codes qualify for the Salary bonus interest.","in_app":true,"product":"paynow"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Is PayNow via GIRO accepted for salary qualification?
{"response":"Yes. PayNow via GIRO qualifies if the transaction description shows GIRO-SALARY.","in_app":true,"product":"paynow"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I combine PayNow salary credit with Save and Spend categories?

{"response":"Yes. Crediting salary via PayNow and meeting the Save and Spend requirements allows you to earn up to the illustrated maximum EIR on your first S$100,000.","in_app":true,"product":"paynow"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Is PayNow listed as an accepted salary credit channel in the Starter Kit?
{"response":"Yes. The Starter Kit states that salary can be credited through GIRO, FAST, PayNow via GIRO or PayNow via FAST.","in_app":true,"product":"paynow"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Does PayNow affect the base 0.05% interest?
{"response":"No. You earn a base interest of 0.05% per year regardless. PayNow salary credit helps you qualify for additional bonus interest.","in_app":true,"product":"paynow"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I make a local transfer using PayNow?

{"response":"Go to ‘Payments & Transfers’ in the OCBC app and choose PayNow to send money locally. You can send and receive money instantly using an NRIC/FIN or mobile number.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Where do I transfer money in the OCBC app now?

{"response":"All transfer options are in one place now. Open the OCBC app and go to ‘Payments & Transfers’ to make local transfers, PayNow transfers, and more.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Why am I asked to enter a code when transferring?

{"response":"This is an added security step to prevent unauthorised transactions. You may be asked to authenticate using a code sent to your registered email address or mobile number.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
My email is wrong so I can’t get the code. What do I do?

{"response":"When prompted for the code, select ‘Authenticate with SMS OTP instead’ to receive it by SMS. After that, update your email address via the OCBC app, OCBC Internet Banking, or an OCBC ATM. The change takes effect after 12 hours.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I transfer to someone using NRIC on the app?
{"response":"Log in to the OCBC app, tap ‘Local Transfers’, select ‘NRIC/FIN number’, enter the payment details, then review and confirm the transfer.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What local transfer options are available in the OCBC app?

{"response":"You can make local transfers via FAST, GIRO or MEPS in the OCBC app. You can also use PayNow to send and receive money instantly using an NRIC/FIN or mobile number.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I schedule a local transfer for later?
{"response":"Yes. In ‘Payments & Transfers’, you can schedule future-dated or recurring transfers and manage them within the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I adjust my transfer limits?
{"response":"You can manage and change your daily transaction limits within ‘Payments & Transfers’ on the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I pay credit card bills in the OCBC app?

{"response":"Go to ‘Payments & Transfers’ in the OCBC app and select Bill payments. You can pay credit card bills and other billing organisations from there.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What is EDP and can I do it in the app?

{"response":"EDP (Electronic Deferred Payment) is a modern alternative to paper cheques and cashier’s orders. You can schedule and track deferred payments from your phone through ‘Payments & Transfers’.","in_app":true,"product":"local transfer"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I pay my OCBC credit card bill?
{"response":"Log in to the OCBC app, tap ‘Cards’, select the card you want, tap the card to view details, then tap ‘Card bill payment’.","in_app":true,"product":"bill payment"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I request a credit card fee waiver in the app?
{"response":"Yes. In the OCBC app, tap ‘More’ at the bottom bar, then ‘Card services’ > ‘Request fee waiver’.","in_app":true,"product":"bill payment"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Where do I find my e-statements?
{"response":"Log in to the OCBC app, tap ‘More’, then under ‘Documents – Statements & Letters’ tap ‘View Documents’ > ‘Statements’.","in_app":true,"product":"bill payment"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I add a payee for bill payments?

{"response":"Tap ‘Pay & Transfer’ at the bottom bar, then ‘Payee list’ > ‘Local and overseas payee’ > ‘Add payee’, and follow the instructions. For security, it will take at least 12 hours for the payee to be added.","in_app":true,"product":"bill payment"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Why can’t I see the Pay feature anymore?
{"response":"The ‘Pay’ and ‘Transfer’ features have been consolidated into ‘Payments & Transfers’ in the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"bill payment"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
I changed my email but still can’t receive the authentication code.

{"response":"Select ‘Authenticate with SMS OTP instead’ to receive the code by SMS. Then update your email using the OCBC app, OCBC Internet Banking or an OCBC ATM. The change takes effect after 12 hours.","in_app":true,"product":"bill payment"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What should I do if the app shows a technical error when I try to pay my bill?

{"response":"Ensure you are using the latest OCBC app version. Exit and relaunch the app, then try again. If it persists, delete and reinstall the app. You will need to reactivate OneToken and the 12-hour cooling period applies before activation.","in_app":true,"product":"bill payment"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I delete a payee I no longer use?
{"response":"Log in to the OCBC app, tap ‘Pay & Transfer’, then ‘Payee list’ > ‘Local and overseas payee’ > ‘Delete payee’, and follow the instructions.","in_app":true,"product":"bill payment"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do I need OneToken for bill payments?

{"response":"For security, you may occasionally be asked to authenticate transactions using a code sent to your registered email or mobile number. You can activate OCBC OneToken via the OCBC app to support secure authorisations.","in_app":true,"product":"bill payment"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I receive payments via EDP or EDP+?

{"response":"You will get an email/push notification/SMS when you receive an EDP/EDP+. To cash it in, log in to the OCBC app > Payments & Transfers > Electronic Deferred Payments (EDP) > View your EDP/EDP+ and cash in on or after the effective date.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What notifications will I get as a payee for EDP?

{"response":"You will be notified (e.g. email and push notification) when an EDP/EDP+ is presented (cashed in) successfully or unsuccessfully, when it is rejected successfully or unsuccessfully, when it is about to expire (3 days in advance) and when it expires.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I track and schedule deferred payments using EDP?

{"response":"Yes. EDP/EDP+ lets you schedule and track deferred payments from your phone, and both payer and payee receive status updates when the payment status changes.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
If an EDP expires, can the payee still cash it in?
{"response":"No. An EDP/EDP+ expires six months from its effective date and cannot be cashed in after it expires. The payee can ask the payer to issue a new EDP.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Why is EDP+ safer for payees?

{"response":"With EDP+, funds are deducted immediately when it is issued, so the amount cannot be used for other transactions. This reduces the risk of non-payment due to insufficient funds compared to EDP.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can companies use EDP for Options to Purchase property ballots?
{"response":"Yes. Both individuals and companies can use EDP/EDP+. Ballots for Options to Purchase property are an example scenario where EDP/EDP+ can be used.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What if I want to cancel an EDP+ but I can’t find the button in the app?
{"response":"EDP+ cancellations by the payer must be done at an OCBC branch. You will be asked to complete an indemnity form.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Where do I go in the OCBC app to reject an EDP or EDP+?

{"response":"Log in to the OCBC app > Payments & Transfers > Electronic Deferred Payments (EDP) > View your EDP/EDP+ > select ‘Received’. Choose the EDP/EDP+ and tap ‘Reject EDP’.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I cancel an issued EDP from the app?

{"response":"Log in to the OCBC app > Payments & Transfers > Electronic Deferred Payments (EDP) > View your EDP/EDP+ > select ‘Issued’. Choose the EDP and tap ‘Cancel EDP’.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What is the earliest date my payee can cash in my EDP?
{"response":"Your payee can cash in an EDP/EDP+ on or after the effective date, which is the earliest date it can be cashed in.","in_app":true,"product":"edp"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
I’m a parent. How do I give pocket money automatically every month?
{"response":"With OCBC MyOwn Account, parents can set up recurring allowances in the OCBC app to schedule pocket money transfers.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I monitor my kid’s spending after setting a recurring allowance?
{"response":"Yes. You can view your child’s transactions on the parent dashboard and receive notifications on the child’s account activities.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do parents get instant alerts on the child account?
{"response":"Yes. Parents get real-time alerts and notifications on the child’s account activities, so you can step in whenever.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What are the default daily limits for my child’s MyOwn transactions?

{"response":"For OCBC MyOwn Account, QR cash withdrawals are limited to S$50 per day. Other transactions have a default daily limit of S$10, which can be increased after a 12-hour cooling-off period.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I manage PayNow limits for my kid’s account?
{"response":"Yes. Parents can manage transaction limits for the child’s account, including PayNow or NETS QR, through the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
If my child turns 16, do I still control the account?

{"response":"When your child turns 16, you will be notified and can choose whether to grant full control of the OCBC MyOwn Account to your child via your OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Is there a cooling-off period if I release control to my 16-year-old?
{"response":"Yes. If you release control, you have a 24-hour cooling-off period to rescind the request via the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What can I do if I think my child’s account got hacked?

{"response":"You can activate OCBC Kill Switch via the OCBC app on the child’s behalf. Once activated, it immediately suspends the child’s current and savings accounts, OCBC app access and debit cards.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I lock funds so they can’t be transferred out?
{"response":"Yes. OCBC Money Lock is available for OCBC MyOwn Account, and locked funds cannot be transferred out.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do my changes to my own contact details automatically update my child’s MyOwn Account details?

{"response":"No. Changes to the parent’s contact details do not automatically update the details for the OCBC MyOwn Account. For child contact detail updates, please visit any OCBC Branch.","in_app":true,"product":"manage scheduled transfers"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What is the default daily limit for overseas transfers?
{"response":"The default daily transaction limit for overseas transfers is S$5,000.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I increase my PayNow limit?

{"response":"Log in to the OCBC app, go to More, select Payments & transfers, tap Manage transaction limits, review and confirm the new limit, and authorise the change using OCBC OneToken or your hardware token.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What happens if I exceed my daily limit?
{"response":"Once a daily transaction limit is set, the total transactions made in a day cannot exceed that limit.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What is the authorisation limit for bill payments?
{"response":"The default authorisation limit for other local and overseas fund transfers and bill payments is S$1,000.00.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I manage transaction limits for my child’s debit card?
{"response":"Yes. Parents can manage transaction limits for the child’s MyOwn Account and debit card individually via the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What are the default limits for PayNow for a child?
{"response":"For MyOwn Account, other transactions have a default daily limit of S$10, which can be increased after a 12-hour cooling-off period.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I deactivate my child’s PayNow limit?
{"response":"Yes. Parents can manage and deactivate transaction limits individually for PayNow or NETS QR via the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Is OneToken required for changing limits?
{"response":"Yes. You must authorise changes to your transaction limits using OCBC OneToken or your hardware token.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I set separate limits for debit card and PayNow?
{"response":"Yes. You can manage transaction limits individually for different transaction types such as PayNow, debit card spending and others.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I manage limits through Internet Banking instead of the app?
{"response":"Yes. Log in to OCBC Internet Banking, go to Customer Service and select Manage transaction limits to review and update your limits.","in_app":true,"product":"manage transaction limits"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I set my ATM withdrawal limit to 5000?
{"response":"Yes. You may set your ATM daily withdrawal limit to S$5,000 via the OCBC app, Internet Banking, ATM or branch.","in_app":true,"product":"manage daily limit"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What is the minimum ATM withdrawal limit option?
{"response":"The minimum ATM withdrawal limit option available is S$1,000 per day.","in_app":true,"product":"manage daily limit"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I deactivate debit card spending?
{"response":"Yes. You can set your debit card daily spending limit to S$0 to deactivate it via the OCBC app under Card services and Manage daily limit.","in_app":true,"product":"manage daily limit"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do I need a hardware token to increase my limit?
{"response":"Yes. As a limit increase is considered a high-risk transaction, you will need OCBC OneToken or a hardware token to complete the request.","in_app":true,"product":"manage daily limit"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I change my ATM withdrawal limit at a branch?
{"response":"Yes. You may visit any OCBC branch to request a change to your daily ATM withdrawal limit.","in_app":true,"product":"manage daily limit"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Are daily limit changes immediate?
{"response":"Yes. Changes to ATM withdrawal and debit card spending limits made through the OCBC app take effect immediately.","in_app":true,"product":"manage daily limit"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I manage my card daily limit via Internet Banking?
{"response":"Yes. Log in to OCBC Internet Banking, go to Customer service, select Card services and Manage card daily limit to update your limits.","in_app":true,"product":"manage daily limit"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What are the debit card spending limit options?
{"response":"The available daily spending limit options for debit cards are S$0 to deactivate, S$200, S$1,000, S$2,000, S$3,000, S$5,000 and S$50,000.","in_app":true,"product":"manage daily limit"}
